summary: Frontend-only testing of editor panel refactor: full-width bottom panel converted to small floating contextual card (340px wide, absolute positioned bottom:16px left:50% translateX(-50%), 16px border-radius, soft shadow). All sections wrapped in accordions (Slide Type, Text, Brand, Design, AI Actions, Export). Preview strip height 66vh. Compact toolbar with icon-only buttons (32x32). All 28+ test cases passed.
passed_tests: Page loads at /dashboard/create with demo user (localStorage.carouselex_demo_user)
Editor panel [data-testid=editor-panel] visible with width 340px (exact)
Editor panel positioned ABSOLUTELY with bottom:16px and transform:translateX(-50%)
Editor panel has border-radius: 16px
Editor panel has soft shadow (rgba with 0.08/0.04)
Preview strip [data-testid=preview-strip] height is 66vh (660px for 1000px viewport)
Panel body [data-testid=editor-panel-body] has overflow-y: auto for internal scroll
Compact toolbar: reorder-prev-btn (32x32), delete-slide-btn (32x32), add-slide-btn (compact purple with 'Add' label), reorder-next-btn (32x32)
Role badge (INTRO/CONTENT/OUTRO) visible in toolbar top-right
Counter (e.g., 1/6) visible in toolbar top-right
Accordion [accordion-slide-type] is OPEN by default
Accordion [accordion-text] is COLLAPSED by default; click header toggles it open
Accordion [accordion-brand] exists on intro slide
Accordion [accordion-brand] NOT visible on content slides (correct behavior)
Accordion [accordion-brand] visible on outro slide
Accordion [accordion-design] exists with palette-editorial, font-modern, bg-solid options
Accordion [accordion-ai-actions] exists with ai-improve, regen-slide, hook-bold, flow-opt-btn, balance-btn, poll-btn
Accordion [accordion-export] exists with export-png, export-pdf, copy-img buttons
Click thumb-1 (content) → panel shows content-type-tabs (Text/Text+Image/Image)
Content slide Text accordion has Title + Paragraph + Hide Counter toggle
Click thumb-5 (outro) → outro-type-tabs (Standard/Headshot/Image) visible
Type switcher works: click intro-type-emoji → emoji-picker appears inside Slide Type accordion
Field toggles (field-toggle-tagline, field-toggle-title, field-toggle-body) work
Real-time binding: type into title-input → preview updates live
Toolbar buttons functional: add-slide-btn adds slide, delete-slide-btn removes, reorder-prev/next-btn moves
Cover-flow preview strip: thumbs visible and clickable with purple outline (#6B4EFF) on active
REGRESSION: Accent word 'Powerful' rendered in accent color in title
REGRESSION: Brand footer (name + role) visible in intro slide bottom-left
REGRESSION: 'Swipe' pill visible in intro slide bottom-right
REGRESSION: Content slides show counter badge top-center
REGRESSION: Outro slide shows CTA pill
Top bar (topic-input, platform icons, generate-btn, save-btn, copy-all-btn) present and unchanged
Panel max-height respects calc(34vh - 32px) constraint
critical_code_review_comments: Floating card implementation is clean: absolute positioning with bottom:16px, left:50%, transform:translateX(-50%)
Accordion pattern properly implemented with openSections state (default: new Set(['slide-type']))
Compact toolbar with icon-only buttons (w-8 h-8 = 32x32) maintains usability
Role-based accordion visibility (brand only on intro/outro) works correctly
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for comprehensive test coverage
Preview strip height (66vh) provides good balance between preview and editor space
seed_data_creation: None needed - uses localStorage demo auth
context_for_next_testing_agent: Editor panel refactored from full-width bottom panel to small floating contextual card (340px wide, max-height calc(34vh - 32px), positioned absolute bottom:16 left:50% transform:translateX(-50%), soft shadow, 16px radius). ALL sections wrapped in accordions: Slide Type (default open), Text (collapsed), Brand (intro/outro only), Design, AI Actions, Export. Compact toolbar with icon-only buttons (32x32). Preview strip height increased to 66vh. All previous functionality preserved including: type switchers (intro/content/outro), field toggles, real-time binding, toolbar buttons, cover-flow preview, accent word rendering, brand footer, swipe pill, counter badges, CTA pill.
screenshots: .screenshots/01_editor_panel_floating.png - Floating editor panel with compact toolbar and accordions
.screenshots/03_content_slide.png - Content slide with content-type-tabs and Text accordion
.screenshots/04_outro_slide.png - Outro slide with outro-type-tabs and brand accordion
.screenshots/05_emoji_picker.png - Emoji picker inside Slide Type accordion
.screenshots/06_realtime_binding.png - Real-time binding test with title update
.screenshots/08_regression_tests.png - Final state showing all features working
